texto: The most visible creators are those artists whose medium is life itself. The ones who express the inexpressible ~ without brush, hammer, clay, or guitar. They neither paint nor sculpt. Their medium is simply being. Whatever their presence touches has increased life. They see, but don't have to draw...Because they are the artists of being alive... :) ~ ☆ ~ Donna J. Stone
explicacao: Orientação direta de Donna J. Stone sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “The most visible creators are those artists whose medium is life itself. The ones who express the…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, artists, medium, útil em momentos de reflexao.
